selection_policy.robustness_filter: IS Pearson IC > 0; OOS Pearson IC > 0; OOS annual Top10%-market excess > 0
selection_policy.complexity: atomic <= 6; same-style composites <= 4; explicit cross-style pairs <= 3; no triples; no recursive nesting
selection_policy.ranking: IS balanced score with complexity penalty; randomized greedy search; OOS magnitudes not used for ordering
